message:
test(workflows): add 51 unit tests for handlers.rs session lifecycle and fallback paths

Tests cover: HandleSessionEnd::record_from_detection, ResumeSessionConfig defaults,
format_resume_command, validate_session_id, build_resume/proceed_step_result,
resume_outcome_to_step_result, FallbackReason Display + serde roundtrip,
build_*_plan functions (human auth, failover disabled, tool missing, accounts exhausted),
fallback_plan_to_step_result, is_fallback_result, FallbackNextStepPlan serde roundtrip,
ResumeSessionOutcome serde roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
